Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO BUDGET AND REVENUE

Title: Enacts the "gas tax holiday act"
Summary: Enacts the "gas tax holiday act"; provides that from the first of the month after the effective date of the section until December 31, 2027 the taxes imposed on retail sales of fuel gas, motor fuel and diesel motor fuel shall be exempt from certain taxes.
LawCode: Add §50, amd §1817, Tax L; amd §89-b, St Fin L; amd §392-i, Gen Bus L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the tax law, the state finance law, and the general business law, in relation to enacting the "gas tax holiday act"
